planted_risks.risk: Hard immovable deadline, old vendor support ends 1 November with no fallback
Key person risk, the only engineer who knows the legacy schema retires in September
Data migration from an undocumented custom SQL database
Vendor risk, an 18 month old startup with no service level agreement in the contract
User adoption risk, long tenured staff moving from green screens to tablets with no approved training budget
Budget risk, vendor quote is 20 percent above the budget set before vendor selection
Timing risk, peak shipping season begins two weeks after go live, leaving no stabilization window
